essential.description: Weekly pantry restock (coffee, tea, basic snacks).

standard.description: Twice-weekly restock with expanded snack/beverage range, appliance upkeep.

premium.description: Daily restock, barista-style coffee setup, dietary-need options, on-call appliance maintenance.

standard.description: Bi-weekly replenishment plus on-demand requests via portal.

premium.description: Weekly replenishment, custom branded supplies, dedicated ordering desk.

essential.description: Daily cleaning and basic consumable restock.

standard.description: Twice-daily cleaning, premium consumables, odor control systems.

premium.description: Round-the-clock attendant service, premium fixtures upkeep, hygiene audits.

essential.description: Scheduled quarterly electrical safety checks, reactive fault response within 48h.

standard.description: Monthly checks, reactive response within 24h, minor fixture upgrades included.

premium.description: Continuous monitoring, 4h emergency response SLA, full preventive maintenance program.

essential.description: Reactive plumbing repairs within 48h, quarterly inspection.

standard.description: Reactive repairs within 24h, monthly inspection, minor fixture replacement included.

premium.description: 4h emergency response SLA, full preventive maintenance, leak-detection monitoring.

essential.description: Single part-time facilities coordinator point of contact.

standard.description: Dedicated full-time on-site facilities coordinator during business hours.

premium.description: Full on-site FM team, vendor management, 24x7 incident response, monthly reporting.
